name: Aditya Malhotra
summary: Product Manager with 4 years of experience building B2B SaaS products in HR-tech and fintech. Launched 3 major features with combined ARR impact of ₹8 Crores. MBA from ISB Hyderabad. Expert in product discovery, OKR-driven roadmapping, and data-informed decision-making. Led cross-functional teams of 8–12 members through 0-to-1 product launches. Deep believer in continuous discovery and hypothesis-driven development.

experience.title: Product Manager – Core HR & Payroll
responsibilities: Owned the Core HR + Payroll vertical for Darwinbox (serving 700+ enterprise clients, 2M+ employees). Managed backlog of 180+ items.
Led the 0-to-1 launch of Payroll Analytics module — reduced payroll processing time by 40% for enterprise clients; attributed to ₹3.2 Crore ARR uplift in first year.
Drove discovery for compliance automation across 22 Indian states — wrote 14 PRDs and coordinated across engineering (8 devs), legal, and design.
Managed quarterly OKR planning and monthly roadmap reviews with CPO and CEO.
Ran 40+ user interviews per quarter across CHROs, payroll managers, and employees.
Launched bulk import feature reducing HR data migration TAT from 2 weeks to 2 days.

experience.title: Associate Product Manager
responsibilities: Supported PM for Razorpay Dashboard — owned 4 features in the analytics and settlement modules.
Shipped International Payments onboarding flow — reduced activation time from 7 days to 22 hours; NPS improved from 32 to 47.
Conducted competitive analysis against Stripe, PayU, and CCAvenue; presented findings to VP Product.
Used Mixpanel and SQL for funnel analytics; identified and fixed 3 critical user drop-off points.

projects.name: Payroll Analytics Module – Darwinbox
projects.description: 0-to-1 product launch: A self-serve analytics module giving payroll managers real-time visibility into salary cost distribution, compliance risks, and processing status. Now used by 300+ enterprise clients.
projects.impact: ₹3.2 Crore ARR uplift | 40% reduction in payroll processing time | NPS improvement: 31 → 54

projects.name: HR Compliance Automation Engine
projects.description: Led discovery and scoping for an automated statutory compliance engine covering PF, ESI, PT, and labour law across 22 Indian states. Currently in beta with 50 clients.
projects.impact: Reduced compliance error rate from 4.8% to 0.6% in beta

achievements: ISB Dean's List — Top 15% of cohort
Darwinbox Product Excellence Award 2023 – Payroll Analytics
Selected for Reforge Retention + Engagement cohort (acceptance rate 8%)
Speaker: Nasscom Product Conclave 2023 — 'Compliance as a Product: Lessons from HR-tech'
